metadata.note: Output used as-is without manual revision or selection.

causal_texts: The glass slipped from Alice's hand. The glass fell to the floor. The glass broke into many pieces. Alice swept them up carefully.

The busy carpenter brought the raw wood to the busy workshop. The busy carpenter transformed the raw wood into the wooden chair. The wooden chair impressed the wealthy merchant in the busy workshop. The wealthy merchant paid the busy carpenter for the wooden chair.
